spacing_and_layout.bottom_nav: fixed bottom-0 left-0 right-0 h-20 bg-[#0B1121]/90 backdrop-blur-xl border-t border-[#1E293B] flex justify-around items-center z-50 md:hidden pb-safe
spacing_and_layout.desktop_sidebar: hidden md:flex flex-col w-64 h-screen border-r border-[#1E293B] bg-[#0B1121] fixed left-0 top-0 p-6
spacing_and_layout.main_content: pb-24 md:pb-8 md:pl-64 pt-6 md:pt-8 min-h-screen bg-[#0B1121] text-slate-200

components_strategy.cards: Use flat backgrounds with 1px solid border. Avoid drop shadows in dark mode, use subtle border highlights instead.
components_strategy.buttons: Primary CTA must be emerald green for profit actions. Secondary buttons use muted slate or blue.
components_strategy.inputs: Shadcn UI styled. Dark backgrounds, high contrast text, emerald green focus rings.
components_strategy.extraordinary_deals: Glassmorphic window: border border-emerald-500/30 bg-emerald-500/10 backdrop-blur-md relative overflow-hidden. Add an absolute pseudo-element with a blur for a glowing effect.
components_strategy.badges: Pill shapes (rounded-full). Hot Deal: bg-emerald-500/20 text-emerald-400 border border-emerald-500/30.

login_background.description: Storage unit background, overlay with bg-[#0B1121]/80 for login screen or hero banner.

feature_background.description: Alternative storage background for generic empty states.

motion_and_interactions.hover: Hovered cards should lift slightly (-translate-y-1) and increase border opacity.
motion_and_interactions.page_transition: Use framer-motion for tab switching (opacity 0->1, y 10->0).

instructions_to_main_agent: Initialize with React, Tailwind CSS, and Shadcn UI.
Install Google Fonts 'Outfit' and 'Manrope' in index.html or via @import in CSS.
Build a mobile-first responsive layout with Bottom Navigation for mobile and Sidebar for desktop.
Tabs/Pages required: Home (Dashboard), Scan, My Bids, Admin.
Implement 'Extraordinary Deals' window on the Dashboard that visualizes hot units with the glowing emerald design.
Admin access must be protected by a simple PIN code screen (mock validation via local storage, e.g., '1234').
Admin Dashboard needs: Form inputs for Default State, an empty customizable County List (allow adding/removing strings), Profit Margin Targets, and a Credit Alerts toggle.
Location Filter: A section searchable by State + County.
Publish Queue: Render a list of analyzed units where admin can click 'Publish' or 'Add to My Bids'.
Use LocalStorage to mock and save user settings and the state of the app (e.g., extraordinary deals threshold settings).
All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute to facilitate robust automated testing.
